page_metadata.biotools__summary: A package for multi-patients analysis of genomic markers. It is devoted to (i) efficient segmentation and (ii) genomic marker selection from multi-patient copy number and SNP data profiles.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A package for multi-patients analysis of genomic markers. It is devoted to (i) efficient segmentation and (ii) genomic marker selection from multi-patient copy number and SNP data profiles.
